mapper.sql: select id, name, short_name, province, city, tier, is_985, is_211, is_double_first, is_public, website, status, created_at, updated_at from school
mapper.select: where status = 'active' order by province, city, name

select count(distinct c.id) collegeCount, count(distinct p.id) programCount, coalesce(sum(case when p.is_408 = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0) program408Count, coalesce(sum(case when exists(select 1 from admission_score a where a.program_id = p.id) then 1 else 0 end), 0) scoreReadyCount, coalesce(sum(case when exists(select 1 from admission_plan ap where ap.program_id = p.id) then 1 else 0 end), 0) planReadyCount, coalesce(sum(case when exists(select 1 from admission_result ar where ar.program_id = p.id) then 1 else 0 end), 0) resultReadyCount from school s left join college c on c.school_id = s.id left join program p on p.college_id = c.id where s.id = #{id}

select c.id, c.name, c.website, c.graduate_url graduateUrl, count(p.id) programCount, coalesce(sum(case when p.is_408 = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0) program408Count from college c left join program p on p.college_id = c.id where c.school_id = #{id} group by c.id, c.name, c.website, c.graduate_url order by c.name

select p.id, c.name collegeName, p.program_code programCode, p.program_name programName, p.research_direction researchDirection, p.study_mode studyMode, p.degree_type degreeType, p.is_408 is408, (select group_concat(concat(sub.code, ' ', sub.name) order by ps.subject_order separator ' / ') from program_subject ps left join subject sub on sub.id = ps.subject_id where ps.program_id = p.id) examSubjects, exists(select 1 from admission_score a where a.program_id = p.id) hasScore, exists(select 1 from admission_plan ap where ap.program_id = p.id) hasPlan, exists(select 1 from admission_result ar where ar.program_id = p.id) hasResult from program p left join college c on c.id = p.college_id where c.school_id = #{id} order by p.is_408 desc, c.name, p.program_code limit 100
mapper.insert:
insert into school
name, short_name, province, city, tier, is_985, is_211, is_double_first, is_public, website, status,
#{name}, #{shortName}, #{province}, #{city}, #{tier}, #{is985}, #{is211}, #{isDoubleFirst}, #{isPublic}, #{website}, #{status},
mapper.delete:
delete from school where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select distinct province from school where status = 'active' and province is not null and province <> '' order by province
